hero.name: Anne Nogueira
hero.description:
Anime, illustrative colour & fine line tattoos.
At SALL Studio, Porto.

about.title: A N N E
about.bio1: Hi, I'm Anne! I specialize in colorful tattoos — especially anime, original illustrations, and cartoons — but I also love a good blackwork piece.
about.bio2: These styles captivate me not only because I personally connect with them, but also because they carry stories, emotional memories, and rich visual references full of feeling and identity.
about.bio3: I'm deeply passionate about tattooing. I believe that making something permanent on the skin is a profound way of expressing ourselves, celebrating who we are, and embracing our bodies — this home that stays with us forever. I see tattooing as a powerful meeting point between art and self-esteem, between the linework and our true identity.
about.bio4: Every project I create is made with love and careful attention to detail. Everything is designed especially for you 🤍
